summary: Follow-up queue captured while moving system_mechanism promotion rule metadata into policy/schema-backed configuration.

observations.problem: The system_mechanism promotion rule registry now has schema-backed rule metadata, but page_class promotion rules still carry reducer and summary semantics only in Python.
observations.why_it_matters: Keeping one promotion path declarative and the other code-only makes future promotion rule audits asymmetric and can hide drift in page-class gate behavior.
observations.automation_candidate: Extend promotion_policy.rule_metadata to page_class rules after the system_mechanism contract has settled, reusing the same RuleMetadata and summary-template flow.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-04-20 KST by adding page_class rule metadata, schema/loader validation, metadata-driven page rule evaluators, and focused page promotion regression coverage while preserving the current report schema and decisions.
